news.summary: Last week, a record number of 320,000 new jobs were added to the economy, surpassing all expectations. This significant increase has brought the unemployment rate down to 3.8%, the lowest in the past decade. Analysts are attributing this growth to various sectors including retail, technology, and healthcare. Additionally, the average hourly wage has risen by 4.5% compared to last year, indicating a positive trend in wage growth as well. Experts anticipate that this positive momentum will continue in the coming months, leading to a more robust and stable economy.
news.headline: Court approves Verde's debt renegotiation agreement, providing relief and restructuring for $10 million debt.

news.summary: The global functional flour market is expected to witness substantial growth, with projections reaching USD 110.93 billion by 2030, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.63%. Factors driving this expansion include the increasing health awareness among consumers, a growing demand for convenient food options, and a preference for clean-label products. The utilization of ancient grains and superfoods is also contributing to market growth. Overall, these trends reflect a shift towards healthier dietary choices and a preference for natural ingredients among consumers.
news.headline: Global functional flour market to reach USD 110.93 billion by 2030 with CAGR of 7.63%, driven by health consciousness and demand for ready-to-eat products.

news.summary: Diodes Incorporated, listed on Nasdaq as DIOD, based in Plano, Texas, has revealed the introduction of a new line of silicon carbide (SiC) products. This series consists of five 650V SiC Schottky diodes with low figure-of-merit (FOM) values. Ranging from 4A to 12A, these diodes are enclosed in the T-DFN8080-4 package known for its exceptional thermal efficiency. The purpose behind this series is to cater to power switching applications requiring high efficiency, such as DC to DC and AC to DC conversion, as well as applications in renewable energy and data centers.
news.headline: Diodes Inc. introduces 650V SiC Schottky diodes series - 4A, 6A, 8A, 10A, 12A - for high-efficiency power switching.

news.summary: In Boston, Komodo Health is organizing The One Day Summit for the third time, bringing together over 200 healthcare leaders and innovators from various sectors like Life Sciences, biopharma, payers, and advocacy groups. This exclusive event will feature speakers from major companies such as Takeda Pharmaceuticals, Johnson & Johnson, Ipsen, and Novartis Pharmaceuticals. Attendees can expect real-world evidence from Komodo customers and insightful discussions on current industry hurdles and future predictions in C-suite sessions.
news.headline: Komodo Health hosts The One Day Summit with 200+ healthcare industry leaders in attendance from top companies like Takeda, J&J, Ipsen, and Novartis.

news.summary: Customers of Amazon Web Services (AWS) worldwide can now utilize ASCENDION AVA+ to benefit from AWS's scalability, reliability, and agility for application development. Businesses have the opportunity to expedite software development, update outdated systems, and capitalize on the resources provided by AWS. This collaboration opens up new possibilities for organizations seeking to enhance their technological capabilities.
news.headline: ASCENDION AVA+ AI platform now available in AWS Marketplace for global customers to accelerate software devpt.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses surpassing $100,000 in Viatris to reach out to him for a discussion regarding potential avenues for recourse. This pertains to the period ranging from August 8, 2024, to February 26, 2025.
news.headline: Deadline alert by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for Viatris investors with losses >$100,000 between Aug 8, 2024 and Feb 26, 2025. Contact James Wilson.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses of over $100,000 in Geron between February 28, 2024, and February 25, 2025, to reach out to him directly. He offers to discuss potential options for those affected by this.
news.headline: Investors in Geron who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 between Feb 28, 2024 - Feb 25, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for investigation.
EU expects US tariffs to remain as discussions make little progress.

news.summary: Robex has recently disclosed the finalization of an underwriting agreement on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), aiming to raise a total of AUD 120 million.
news.headline: Robex signs underwriting agreement for AUD 120 million on ASX for gross proceeds.

news.summary: Sure, here it is -According to recent reports, the budget deficit for the current fiscal year is projected to reach $2.3 trillion, which is significantly higher than the previous year's deficit of $984 billion. This increase can be attributed to the economic impact of the pandemic, leading to a decrease in revenue and an increase in government spending. The national debt is also expected to rise to $27.9 trillion by the end of the fiscal year. The government has implemented various relief measures to support individuals and businesses during these challenging times, but the long-term effects on the economy remain uncertain.
news.headline: SPACs resurgence boosts Webull founder's wealth to over $5B.
Fear and Greed Index: 22/100 = Extreme Fear
China's Customs Administration: We're holding meetings with trade businesses and industry associations.
Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 38/100 - Fear

news.summary: BlueCart, a company based in Sunnyvale, California, revealed a set of innovative features on April 15, 2025, aimed at enhancing restaurant profitability and simplifying vendor operations. As a top all-in-one procurement and back-of-house solution provider for restaurants and vendors, BlueCart unveiled this suite of new features to improve efficiency in the industry. This update is set to propel restaurant revenue and vendor processes to the next level.
news.headline: BlueCart introduces new tools for restaurant profitability, including inventory and menu benchmarking. Sunnyvale, CA, April 15, 2025. #BlueCart #RestaurantProfitability.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 15, 2025, an inventor from Brodheadsville, PA shared details about a new innovation called THE GUTTER VATOR. This invention is a winch system designed to facilitate the easy raising and lowering of seamless gutter sections with the aim of improving efficiency and safety. The inventor highlighted the inspiration behind the creation as the need for a solution that could be managed by a single person. The innovation is expected to streamline gutter-related tasks and enhance productivity for individuals or businesses involved in gutter installations.
news.headline: Inventor from Brodheadsville, PA develops THE GUTTER VATOR winch system to raise/lower seamless gutter sections.

news.summary: In recent findings, a notable percentage of advisors are not utilizing any lead generation tools or are unaware of the most profitable marketing channels. This information emerged from research conducted in TROY, Mich. and TAMPA, Fla. on April 15, 2025. The study sought to understand the strategies employed by financial advisors and other professionals in the finance industry to boost their businesses. The statistics showed a surprising lack of utilization of valuable lead generation techniques among advisors, indicating a need for greater awareness and education in this regard.
news.headline: Seminar rated 2nd best ROI for new clients; many advisors lack lead gen tools or ROI knowledge: AcquireUp survey.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in The Bancorp to reach out to him for a discussion regarding potential options. If your losses fall within this range and occurred between January 25, 2024, and March 4, Wilson is available for direct contact to provide guidance on next steps.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for The Bancorp investors with losses exceeding $50,000 between Jan 25, 2024 and March 4. Contact James Wilson for options.

news.summary: In Claymont, Delaware on April 15, 2025, Vital, a company specializing in AI-powered patient experience, revealed the addition of Bridget Duffy, MD, to its board of directors. Dr. Duffy, renowned for her efforts in humanizing healthcare, joins the board bringing with her extensive experience in clinical and operational aspects of the field.
news.headline: Bridget Duffy, MD, joins Vital's board of directors, bringing expertise in humanizing patient experience. #Healthcare #AI

news.summary: As of April 15, 2025, Chief Human Resource Officers (CHROs) have become increasingly crucial in shaping business strategy, emerging as vital consultants for CEOs and boards. Recent statistics from The Conference Board reveal a notable surge in CHRO interactions with the board.
news.headline: CHROs are increasingly collaborating with corporate boards, revealed data shows. Business impact rising.

news.summary: Sprinkles Chocolate, an offshoot of the well-known cupcake bakery, is introducing a popular seasonal treat, S’Mores Cupcake Cups, to be available year-round at Kroger, Fred Meyer, and King Sooper stores across the country beginning in mid-April. This new product features a delicious combination of marshmallow-flavored frosting filling encased in decadent chocolate and finished with graham cracker crumbles. Initially launched as part of Sprinkles’ retail venture last year, the S’Mores Cupcake Cups have been well-received.
news.headline: Sprinkles Chocolate introduces S'Mores Cupcake Cups at Kroger, Fred Meyer, King Sooper stores in mid April.

news.summary: The Global AI Internet Freedom Fund (GAIIFF) introduced Aitium, a robust sales intelligence and inventory planning tool for Amazon Business Marketplace merchants. Aitium aims to enhance B2B sales efficiency by offering AI-driven inventory forecasting, corporate customer analysis, and global marketplace data for 23 Amazon Business regions. It ensures increased conversions and reduced return rates for Amazon Business sellers.
news.headline: GAIIFF launches Aitium for Amazon Business sellers, offering AI-driven insights across 23 regions.

news.summary: Keyaki Capital has introduced a groundbreaking digital platform in Tokyo, Japan, enabling online access to private equity, credit, and other private market funds.
news.headline: Keyaki Capital introduces Japan's initial online private asset investment platform, providing access to private equity and credit funds.
Canada's PM Carney: Major auto firm CEOs are telling me that they want to maintain their activities in Canada.

news.summary: A report on the South Korea construction industry predicts a 3.5% annual growth rate, reaching KRW 119.24 trillion in 2025. The market experienced significant growth between 2020-2024, with a CAGR of 6.5%. The positive trend is expected to persist in the coming years. The data has been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.
news.headline: South Korea construction market to reach KRW 119.24 trillion in 2025, growth of 3.5% annually. Robust growth trend expected to continue.

news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is inviting investors who have suffered losses surpassing $50,000 in Maravai LifeSciences to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. For those affected by losses exceeding $50,000 in Maravai LifeSciences between August 7, [missing information], it is recommended to contact Attorney James Wilson for further assistance.
news.headline: Deadline alert: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Maravai LifeSciences investors with losses over $50,000. Contact James Wilson.

news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina on April 15, 2025, Data Decisions Group (DDG), specializing in data-driven marketing and analytics solutions, revealed the addition of Michael Hannay as Chief Revenue Officer and Brian DiMarino as Senior Executive, fortifying its executive leadership team. This move underscores DDG's commitment to growth and innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Data Decisions Group appoints Michael Hannay as Chief Revenue Officer & Brian DiMarino as Senior Leader to executive team. #DDGExpansion
Canada's PM Carney: Automakers that keep Canadian production get a 100% exemption.

news.summary: Philadelphia-based technology company, Inoxoft, is providing a Software Technical Audit to safeguard eCommerce websites from downtime and enhance their performance, potentially preventing losses of $675 million on Black Friday.
news.headline: Black Friday downtime may cost retailers $675 million, Inoxoft provides audit to prevent losses.

news.summary: Intentsify, a prominent B2B intent data and AI-driven marketing programs provider based in Westwood, Massachusetts, has revealed the appointment of Chris Modzelewski as the Executive Vice President of Ad Solutions and Data Monetization. This significant leadership move signifies Intentsify's strategic effort to enhance their presence in the audience and ad solutions sector. The company is experiencing notable growth, and this addition is expected to further distinguish their offerings in the market.
news.headline: Intentsify names Chris Modzelewski EVP of Ad Solutions and Data Monetization, expanding in growing market.

news.summary: A global partnership has been announced between Shippeo and Elemica aimed at enhancing supply chain orchestration. The partnership is set to have a significant impact on the IT sector, with details revealing that the collaboration will focus on leveraging Shippeo's expertise in real-time transportation visibility and Elemica's prowess in supply chain digital transformation. This joint effort is geared towards providing comprehensive solutions to enhance supply chain efficiency on a global scale.
news.headline: Shippeo and Elemica Partner to Improve Supply Chain Orchestration globally. Paris-based Shippeo to collaborate with IT company Elemica.

news.summary: AM Best, headquartered in Oldwick, New Jersey, will have a significant presence at the upcoming InsurTech Hartford Symposium on April 29-30, 2025, at the Connecticut Convention Center in Hartford. Sridhar Manyem, the senior director of Industry Research and Analytics at AM Best, will lead a panel session titled “Regulatory Challenges and Compliance: Adapting to New Rules While Fostering Innovation.” The event aims to address current and future regulatory issues within the insurance industry.
news.headline: AM Best to host discussions at InsurTech Symposium on April 29-30, 2025 in Hartford, CT. Panel on "Regulatory Challenges and Compliance" moderated by Sridhar Manyem.

news.summary: A technology and research firm, ISG, has recognized Chetu, a global provider of digital intelligence and software solutions, for its advanced analytics and Artificial Intelligence (AI) services. Chetu was highlighted in ISG's Provider Lens™ Advanced Analytics and AI Services report as being in the “Sweet Spot” section. Key capabilities of Chetu mentioned in the report include comprehensive AI and analytics expertise, data integration and modernization, and next-gen AI capabilities. This acknowledgment underscores Chetu's prowess in the tech industry and signifies its strong position in the market.
news.headline: ISG acknowledges Chetu for AI & analytics excellence, highlighting key capabilities in report. via Business Wire.

news.summary: Today, the prestigious 2022 Governor's State of Sport Award for "Event of the Year" was claimed at the Jon M. Huntsman Center at the University of Utah. The event, held in VISTA, Calif., on April 15, 2025, was a remarkable collaboration between the Utah Sports Commission and Tony Hawk Inc. showcasing an extraordinary weekend dedicated to skateboarding.
news.headline: Utah Sports Commission and Tony Hawk Inc. host 5th Annual Tony Hawk's Vert Alert, winner of 2022 Governor's State of Sport Award at the University of Utah's Huntsman Center. Weekend event in April 2025.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Hong Kong, Ruko, a well-known brand specializing in family-friendly drones, introduced the U11MINI 4K. This compact drone is aimed at beginners, travelers, and photography lovers. The U11MINI 4K boasts ultra-clear 8K imaging and a remarkable 20,000ft long-range capability.
news.headline: Ruko launched U11MINI 4K drone - compact, beginner-friendly with 8K imaging, 20,000ft long-range.

news.summary: The recent collapse of the Mantra (OM) token has led to comparisons with the Terra ecosystem crash in May 2022, with some calling Mantra the "next Terra." However, experts like Ben Yorke from DeFi project Woo and Alexis Sirkia from Yellow Network argue that the two incidents are fundamentally different. Mantra's OM token plummeted 92% on April 13, dropping from over $6 to approximately $0.52 within hours, resulting in a $5.4 billion market capitalization loss. In contrast, TerraClassicUSD (formerly UST) took five days to lose a similar percentage, shedding $17.2 billion. The LUNA crash exhibited a more gradual decline. Yorke and Sirkia mentioned that Terra's collapse was due to systemic issues with its algorithmic stablecoin, while Mantra's crash was attributed to mismanagement and insider-held tokens being moved to exchanges. The experts emphasized that Mantra's failure was not due to a protocol flaw but to a breakdown in token handling. The Mantra CEO plans to release a report on the events leading to the crash.
news.headline: Mantra's OM token crashed by 92%, losing $5.4 billion in just hours, sparking comparisons to Terra Luna's $17.2 billion crash.

news.summary: A prominent investment firm has acquired NSM's U.S. commercial insurance division to drive growth and innovation within the MGA platform. As part of the transition, NSM will transform into two distinct entities, introducing two new independent brands. The acquisition was finalized on April 15, 2025, in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania. This move is set to invigorate the MGA platform and is a strategic step towards expansion and development within the commercial insurance sector.
news.headline: NSM Insurance Group sells U.S. commercial insurance division to New Mountain Capital, creating two separate entities.

news.summary: A special 12-year Kentucky Straight Bourbon will be released in limited quantity to commemorate the grand opening in LEXINGTON, Ky on May 14, 2025. RD1 Spirits, recognized for its innovative Kentucky Straight Bourbon and distinctive wood finishes, unveiled this news on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: RD1 Spirits opening new distillery in Lexington on May 14, 2025. Limited release of 12-year Kentucky Straight Bourbon.

news.summary: In its recent global survey, GMAC reported a growing emphasis on Return on Investment (ROI) among business school candidates, with diminishing appeal of the tech sector. Released on April 15, 2025 in Reston, Virginia by PRNewswire, the survey reveals a strong desire among prospective students to acquire strategic thinking skills. The survey encompasses a large number of participants and signifies a shifting trend in candidate preferences for business education.
news.headline: GMAC survey shows aspiring business students prioritize strategic thinking, seek help from AI. Increasing focus on ROI as tech sector appeal diminishes.@dynamic dates.
